tools.art_pipeline: Maya, Substance Painter, Houdini, proprietary asset manager
tools.qa_tools: TestRail, custom automation framework, device farm

qa_process.notes: Dedicated QA teams per project. Custom automation framework covers smoke tests and regression. Manual testing focused on gameplay and edge cases. Performance testing runs on device farm but results take 48hrs. Bug triage meetings consume significant producer time.

localization.notes: 15 languages across 4 titles. Dedicated loc team manages vendor relationships. Quality is high but turnaround is still a bottleneck for live-service content drops. Cultural adaptation reviews add 3-5 days. Loc bugs account for 15% of all shipped bugs.

asset_creation.notes: Established pipeline with proprietary asset management. Multiple art directors across projects create bottleneck in approval flow. Asset reuse across projects is low despite a shared library initiative. Texture and material creation is the slowest stage.

deployment.notes: GitLab CI handles builds. Manual approval gates for console submissions. 6 platform targets mean build matrix is large. Mobile builds have separate pipeline. Average 3hrs from merge to deployable build. Console cert failures cause 1-2 week delays.

audio.notes: Large VO casts across multiple titles. Custom dialogue pipeline handles branching narratives. Re-recording for localization is the biggest time sink. Music and ambient audio outsourced to specialized studios. Adaptive audio system requires extensive testing.

project_management.notes: Hybrid methodology — sprints within milestone-driven schedule. Cross-project dependencies create scheduling conflicts. Status reporting across 4 titles takes significant producer bandwidth. Velocity tracking exists but is not used for prediction.
